settings.text: 🇦🇺 Australian Made & Owned — Trusted by AFL, Football Australia & 500+ venues nationwide.

settings.subheading: Goals, goalposts, flagpoles, and coaching boxes built for Australia's premier venues. Trusted by the AFL, Football Australia, and 500+ sporting facilities nationwide.

settings.quote: PILA's AFL goal posts are second to none. The installation team was professional, quality exceptional, and they've stood up perfectly through multiple AFL seasons.
settings.name: David Morgan

settings.quote: We've used PILA for every project across our council's sporting precinct upgrades. Their technical support during the tender process is unmatched.
settings.name: Sarah Chen

settings.quote: The flagpoles have been in place for 8 years without any issues. The wind certification gave our engineers exactly what they needed for sign-off.
settings.name: Mark Sullivan

settings.quote: PILA handled our full stadium specification from concept to installation. Everything arrived on time and within budget — that's rare in this industry.
settings.name: Jane Williams

settings.heading: Ready to Spec Your Next Project?
settings.subheading: Talk to our team about your venue requirements. We handle everything from initial specification to installation across Australia.
